name: transaction-type-missing-all-signals
rationale: Broker email mentions submission but no transaction_type signal. loan_application omits transaction_type field. No mortgage_statement attached (DS=M1) — removes inference path. F1.TT has zero signal across all tiers. Expected behavior UNDEFINED — possibilities: (a) default to refinance (most common), (b) flag-as-missing, (c) admin escalation. Layer 3 product-design item.
notes: Single-event sequence. Distinct from A30 (which has mortgage_statement inference path); A31 has no inference path at all. Layer 3 pending_product_decision.
